title: YTP - The cure for an orange headache
description:
Round 4 of YPT tennis Vs. Wheelerdude

Caught up in the madness, House and the rest of the house try to find a cure for it using their alien moon language, only to make matters worse...

Been quite busy the past few days so I've had to rush this one a little bit. Apologies for that, but I should make up for it in round 6 for sure! 

Clips/Audio added;

House
Dangermouse (different clip this time, last round was only a cutout :P)
The Zoo Race game movie...
Star Wars
Star Trek
Iron Maiden - The Wickerman
Some random documentry... I was originally looking for the scene in Team America with the cockroach but this had to do :P
Countryfile
